About.title: About Ichara
About.subtitle: Making Moroccan Sign Language accessible to everyone.
About.missionText: Ichara is an interactive platform dedicated to teaching Moroccan Sign Language (MSL). Our goal is to bridge communication gaps and make sign language learning accessible, engaging, and effective for everyone — whether you're a student, educator, parent, or someone who wants to connect with the deaf community in Morocco.
About.whyText: "Ichara" (إشارة) means "sign" in Arabic. We chose this name because it represents exactly what we do — we help people learn the signs that bring communities together. Moroccan Sign Language is rich and expressive, yet learning resources have been scarce. Ichara changes that.
About.feature1Text: Learn signs organized by categories and difficulty levels, from greetings to advanced vocabulary.
About.feature2Text: Every sign comes with a clear video demonstration to ensure you learn the correct hand shapes and movements.
About.feature3Text: Track your learning journey with streaks, achievements, and detailed progress reports on your dashboard.
About.feature4Text: Full support for both Arabic and English, making the platform accessible to a wider audience.
About.openSourceText: Ichara is built with love for the Moroccan deaf community. We believe in making education open and accessible. If you'd like to contribute signs, translations, or feedback, we'd love to hear from you.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.introText: At Ichara, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your personal data.
Privacy.collectItem1: Account information (name, email address) when you sign up
Privacy.collectItem2: Learning progress data (signs learned, streaks, activity history)
Privacy.collectItem3: Usage data to improve the platform experience
Privacy.useItem1: To provide and maintain your learning account
Privacy.useItem2: To track your progress and display it on your dashboard
Privacy.useItem3: To improve our platform and learning content
Privacy.useItem4: To communicate important updates about the service
Privacy.storageText: Your data is stored securely in our database. Passwords are hashed using industry-standard algorithms. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.
Privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. These are necessary for the platform to function and cannot be disabled.
Privacy.rightsItem1: Access your personal data at any time through your dashboard
Privacy.rightsItem2: Request deletion of your account and associated data
Privacy.rightsItem3: Update your personal information through your account settings
Privacy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting a notice on the platform.
Privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.acceptText: By accessing and using Ichara, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the platform.
Terms.accountItem1: You must provide accurate information when creating an account
Terms.accountItem2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
Terms.accountItem3: You must be at least 13 years old to create an account
Terms.accountItem4: One person may not maintain more than one account
Terms.useItem1: Use the platform for personal, educational purposes
Terms.useItem2: Do not attempt to access other users' accounts
Terms.useItem3: Do not use automated tools to scrape or download content
Terms.useItem4: Do not upload malicious content or attempt to compromise the platform
Terms.contentText: All learning content, videos, and materials on Ichara are protected by copyright. You may use them for personal learning but may not redistribute, modify, or use them commercially without permission.
Terms.disclaimerText: Ichara is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. While we strive for accuracy in our sign language content, we recommend supplementing your learning with real-world practice and interaction with the deaf community.
Terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may also delete your account at any time.
Terms.changesText: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
Terms.contactText: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at
